rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v13 Task 4a within scope. inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS (AM-40 five spine packages) + explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE, DOC_ROOTS with docs/runs and self-weave exclusions, CONTRACT_FILES (D31), five weaver ids with integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS proven deep-equal to the frozen normative table (git→[package-files,package-symbols], code→[package-modules], test→[package-manifests,test-files], doc→[doc-files], ledger→[contract-files,ledger-sources,run-sources]), and LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS deeply frozen with exact key set {module,node:module} and values ["builtinModules","isBuiltin"] plus mutation/deep-equal units. Per D17/AM-17 only git and code WEAVER_IMPL_FILES closures are committed (registry+git; registry+code+util), every named file exists, and no orchestrator/test/doc/ledger weaver impl lists land. util.mjs exports the ONE shared D33 classifyModuleLoads + resolveRelativeSpecifier (AM-34 test 19 proves single definition and dual consumers), dependency-free comment/string/regex-aware lexer, Phase-1 export scanner (function|async function|const|class), real-file walker rejecting root escape and symlink input, D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; accounting driver-held only), D21 physical-containment (lstat every component, never follow), and no-shell git wrapper allowing only the exact subcommand/arg shapes. test-closure derives closures with the shared classifier/resolver and proves committed inventories equal derived fixed points (never trusted), covering every accepted form via form-only fixtures, recursion/cycles/conditional literal dynamic import, permitted merkle-dag traversal, and all fatal/no-edge modes. git.mjs emits introduced-by via exactly `git log -S<symbol> --format=%H --reverse -- <path>` and `git log --format=%H --reverse -- <path>`, first result, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns. code.mjs emits depends-on across all four endpoint shapes with symbol- vs file-level threading, unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable .mjs targets, unused imports no edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node:/clotho-relative/permitted vendor only, spine read-only, confined to clotho/. Deterministic gate finalStatus meets. No reinterpretation or scope expansion (4b/5 items deferred).
